gatewayLog.title: Gateway log
gatewayLog.clearTitle: Clears this view only; does not delete log files on disk.
gatewayLog.liveTitle: Tail the current instance Gateway log file
gatewayLog.autoScrollTitle: Scroll to bottom when new lines arrive
gatewayLog.hintPaused: Turn on Live tail to stream this instance; Auto-scroll follows new lines.
gatewayLog.hintConnecting: Connecting to this instance's Gateway log file…
gatewayLog.hintIdle: No lines yet; new writes appear here (Clear only affects this buffer).
